title: Financial Scholarships
content:
Scholarships at Morgan State University

---

SCHOLARSHIPUNIVERSE

Students can apply for scholarships and grants through the University's scholarship platform, ScholarshipUniverse (SU). This online platform helps match students with relevant, vetted external scholarship opportunities, as well as internal scholarships offered by the university.

Website: https://morgan.scholarshipuniverse.com/

Important Notes:
- Students who receive the Bozeman, Quinn, or Jenkins awards are not eligible for the Special Assistance awards available through SU
- They may qualify for other awards
- Need-based funds may be reduced or canceled if students receive other institutional aid that exceeds their actual costs

---

INSTITUTIONAL SCHOLARSHIPS

These awards are available on a limited basis to new and continuing Morgan students:
- Based on need and academic average
- Award amounts vary
- Not guaranteed

---

SCHOLARSHIP ACCEPTANCE POLICY

Students awarded full academic, institutional, or athletic scholarships are NOT eligible to receive other MSU institutional awards.

If multiple full awards are offered from separate MSU offices, programs, and/or committees, students will be required to select only ONE award offer.

---

AWARD PAYMENT AND OVERAWARDS

Your total combined financial aid cannot exceed your MSU Cost of Attendance budget. This includes:
- Academic/merit awards
- Academic grants and scholarships
- University need-based awards
- All other aid from all sources (government, MSU, and private)

If Total Aid Exceeds Cost of Attendance:
1. If all University-funded awards, funding will be adjusted
2. Reduction order: Loans first, then University funding, then outside funds

---

OVERAWARD INFORMATION

Overawards usually result from:
- Student receiving aid the Financial Aid Office was not aware of
- Application errors by the student or Financial Aid Office

Student Responsibility:
- Provide written documentation of additional resources to the Financial Aid Office
- Do this as soon as you become aware of additional aid
- All sources of aid must be accounted for, even if not processed through the office

Important: We are bound by Federal regulation to correct overawards, which may result in:
- Funds being returned to an aid program
- Student owing the university money
- No exceptions can be made

---

COST OF ATTENDANCE

View information on Cost of Attendance on the Morgan State University Financial Aid website.
